subject: 3D template matching for tomogram
body:
Hi,
 I want to pick particles from a 3D tomogram, and I have a 3D template I 
want to use for it. I tried using the MATCH TEMPLATE, but the program 
crashes. However, it did manage to produce a .star file with what I assume 
was the x,y positions of 9 particles, which were not correct. What would 
you recommend?

Thanks,

Zipora
